strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic frameworks)
Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture background in high-throughput environments
Demonstrated ability to scale engineering teams and implement disciplined development practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited direct fintech infrastructure experience (credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance)
Lacks explicit production-scale multi-agent AI system experience beyond tooling contributions
No clear track record of scaling engineering organizations to 30+ people in a regulated environment
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical versatility and leadership in distributed systems, but his resume lacks depth in core fintech infrastructure and production-scale multi-agent AI systems. His recent work in AI-agent tooling is promising but not yet at the level required for a CTO role in a regulated, high-stakes fintech environment. The candidate’s strengths in engineering discipline and event-driven architecture are counterbalanced by gaps in domain-specific experience and scale.
